title: Milk prices may rise again by July as El Niño threatens fodder supply

Major dairies are closely monitoring the situation.

Shahidi's determined innings, battling through trouble and cramps, guided Afghanistan to a respectable 218 after an early collapse.

description: Tragedy struck Parbhani as the roof of an under-construction Hanuman temple collapsed, claiming five lives and injuring at least 17 devotees. The incident occurred at Yashwadi in Manavat taluka on Saturday afternoon. Heavy Rajasthani pink stones, used in construction, are suspected to be a factor. The temple was reportedly open despite ongoing work, following local requests. Rescue operations are underway, with authorities promising financial aid to affected families.

title: Trump on Anthropic CEO’s response to Claude ban: People get put in prison immediately
description: Former President Donald Trump has expressed confidence in AI firm Anthropic and its CEO, Dario Amodei, following White House concerns over advanced AI models. Trump stated Amodei responded "very responsibly" to national security worries, a shift from earlier apprehension. Restrictions on certain AI models have been eased as discussions progress on security standards, with Trump emphasizing the need for US AI leadership over hindering innovation.

title: India's urban housing demand set for a major boost - here's what's driving it
description: India's urban landscape is poised for a major transformation, driven by rapid urbanization and policy reforms. A KPMG report highlights the critical role of housing and urban planning in achieving "Viksit Bharat 2047." Key focus areas include expanding affordable housing for lower-income groups and developing a structured rental housing market. The report advocates for streamlined approvals, improved infrastructure, and enhanced regulatory coordination to ensure sustainable urban growth and protect homebuyers.

description: India, once concerned about a population boom, now faces a declining birth rate, with the Total Fertility Rate dropping to 1.9 children per woman, below the replacement level. This significant shift reflects women's increased educational attainment, career focus, and later marriages, leading to more personal choices about family planning.  The narrative is evolving from population control to individual decisions, marking a societal transition.

Why India doesn’t rank in top 50 world’s most powerful passports
description: Despite India's robust economic growth, its passport ranks surprisingly low globally, hovering around the 80th position. This reflects a slower expansion of visa-free access compared to other nations. Factors like diplomatic ties, reciprocal agreements, and perceived security influence rankings, not just economic might. India's progress is gradual, requiring strategic diplomatic efforts and strengthened internal systems to boost international trust and improve its travel freedom.

Key routes like Mumbai-Ahmedabad will see journeys slashed to under two hours, while Bengaluru-Chennai will take just over an hour. This ambitious expansion, including the Delhi-Varanasi-Patna corridor, aims to boost connectivity and usher in an era of unprecedented railway development across the nation.

title: NEET centre mix-up: NTA says Nasik candidate himself selected Abu Dhabi option

The NTA also claimed that the centre was previewed twice from the candidates' credentials. "​Despite that NTA has accorded to aspirant’s request and the change of centre was actioned," the body said. ​​

title: India eyes F1 return by 2028 as sports ministry forms task force

The National Testing Agency has implemented strict security, including CCTV surveillance and biometric verification. Candidates must bring a new admit card, original ID, and passport-sized photos. The exam duration is extended to 195 minutes, and a new dress code is in effect. Authorities warn against fake news regarding paper leaks.

title: First time in 1078-ODI history! Rohit Sharma and Prasidh become first ...

description: Indian Army achieved a pivotal victory at Point 5140, the highest point on the Tololing ridgeline, on June 20, 1999. This strategic capture, led by Captain Sanjeev Singh Jamwal and Captain Vikram Batra, crucial for controlling the Dras sector and the Srinagar-Leh National Highway, was announced with distinct success signals. The triumph paved the way for further Indian advances, marking a turning point in the Kargil War.

title: After losing three newborns, woman with rare blood disorder delivers healthy baby at JJ Hospital
China's economy struggles to regain domestic momentum despite export boom: Report
description: Despite strong export growth, China's domestic economy faces significant challenges. Consumer spending saw a decline in May, with retail sales falling for the first time since late 2022. Consumer confidence remains low, and credit demand is weak, indicating reluctance from businesses and households to borrow. The property sector continues to struggle, though some major cities show signs of stabilization. Semiconductor exports, however, are a notable bright spot, surging significantly.

The altercation, which began on platform number 3, escalated into a fatal assault. Authorities are actively investigating, reviewing CCTV footage and questioning witnesses to identify and apprehend those responsible for the deadly scuffle.

They also allegedly took his girlfriend's video, made false accusations, and threatened the couple's mother for a ransom.

description: Google CEO Sundar Pichai, addressing Stanford's Class of 2026, urged graduates to embrace optimism and tackle challenging endeavors. He shared personal anecdotes, emphasizing that meaningful work stems from genuine passion rather than external expectations. Pichai's core message highlighted the importance of perseverance and continuous forward movement, regardless of life's inevitable uncertainties.

'Beat her over petty issues': Pune techie jumps to death; husband, in-law booked
description: A 27-year-old software engineer tragically ended her life by jumping from her Pune residence on Thursday. Her brother's complaint alleges that her husband and mother-in-law subjected her to persistent harassment and physical abuse over minor matters.  The couple, who met at a software firm, married in November 2024. Police have registered a case against the husband and his relatives for abetting the suicide.

Death trap in the deep: The silent sinkhole of Bengaluru’s sewage plant
description: Two workers vanished inside a Bengaluru sewage plant, sparking outrage from activists who claim they were illegally hired for hazardous work without safety. The water authority denies manual scavenging, stating the men entered unauthorizedly while attempting gate repairs. The incident highlights ongoing concerns about worker safety and accountability in the city's sanitation sector, with calls for prosecution of responsible officials.

title: Happy Father's Day: Top 80 wishes, greetings and quotes to make your dad feel special
description: Fathers often express love through actions, not words, and Father's Day on June 21, 2026, is a time to appreciate their guidance and support. Simple gestures like cooking a favorite meal or sharing memories can mean more than gifts. This day is about acknowledging their sacrifices and letting them know they are deeply appreciated.
